atomly_core_relation: Atomly-Core-100 is intentionally kept as a separate package and is not included here.
reporting_rule: May run as one external package; preserve dataset_family and report each family separately. Do not publish one pooled headline accuracy.
dara_precursor_independence_rule: 2min and 8min are paired acquisitions of the same 20 physical mixtures.
dara_reaction_reference_rule: Expert-reference consistency only; 16 fully indexed and 4 partially indexed samples.
